body_txt: Notice how things take on an entirely different slant when you say them in a foreign language? The following languages and dialects (at least to English-speakers) hold the following stereotypes:  This is, of course, subject to Values Dissonance , as the French don't necessarily think their language sounds the sexiest. They usually dub the 'sexy foreign language parts' in Italian or Spanish, and they usually perceive their own accent in English as horrible . May overlap with Gratuitous French if there really is no reason for it to be in French. Compare Gratuitous Foreign Language , As Long as It Sounds Foreign , British Accents . See also Everyone Looks Sexier if French and French Cuisine Is Haughty .
